evals.prompt: Compare my Meta Ads campaign spend, clicks, impressions, CTR, conversions, and CPA for the last 30 days without changing anything.
evals.expected_output: Reads the meta-ads skill, checks the Nango connection, discovers ad accounts, and runs bounded read-only insights through the bundled CLI and generic integration proxy.
expectations: The run reads the meta-ads skill before account operations
The run uses the bundled meta_ads.ts CLI through Bash and does not call a Meta-specific MCP tool
The CLI uses masterclaw connections check and masterclaw integrations request instead of tokens or direct Graph API calls
The report uses a bounded date range and at most 100 rows
The answer names the Meta action type used as conversions or CPA

evals.prompt: Connect my Facebook Ads account so you can inspect it.
evals.expected_output: Reads the meta-ads skill and uses one masterclaw connections ensure call, returning the capability link without requesting credentials in chat.
expectations: The run reads the meta-ads skill
The run calls masterclaw connections ensure --provider meta-ads exactly once
The response returns the capability link and stops without asking for tokens

evals.prompt: Create and launch a new Meta campaign with a $200 daily budget.
evals.expected_output: Uses the Meta Ads CLI to clarify currency and special-ad-category details, creates a paused validate-only plan, shows the exact plan, and waits for explicit approval before any mutation.
expectations: The run reads the meta-ads skill
The run does not guess the account currency or special-ad-category classification
The run creates a campaign-plan-create plan that Meta validates without mutating
The planned campaign is PAUSED and activation is a separate update
The response displays the exact plan ID and waits for explicit approval before campaign-apply

evals.prompt: I have organization ad accounts in my Meta Business Portfolio, but you only found my directly authorized account. Reconnect with the permission you need.
evals.expected_output: Explains that Business Portfolio discovery requires business_management, asks for an in-place reconnect after the Nango scope is enabled, and preserves all existing Chorus agent links.
expectations: The response does not conclude that the organization accounts do not exist
The response identifies business_management as required for Business Portfolio discovery
The response says reconnect updates the existing Nango connection in place and preserves agent links
The response never asks to delete, disconnect, unlink, or replace the existing connection
